prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约739名，2024年约782名，2025年约747名，近三年位次在739-782之间窄幅波动，2025年较2024年有所回升（位次数字减小），整体呈高位稳定 态势，2025年基准约747名；本省理科计划2023年39人、2024年39人、2025年36人；2026年计划36人，与2025年持平，未出现扩招或缩招，对竞争格局无 直接冲击。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第33名，近年排名稳定在28-33名之间，属于国内顶尖理工类院校；2026年高考周期内声誉评价偏负面，涉及学生困难认定事件处理方式受批评、副教授师德失范停课事件；抖音热度为较热（总排名第33位），短视频曝光量中等偏上；2022年曾 出现投档线异常关注信号（低关注），整体热度平稳；信息与通信工程A+、电子科学与技术A+、计算机科学与技术A，共6个A-及以上学科，电子信息领域学科实 力全国顶尖，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 电子信息/通信类2024年高热推荐，计算机类推荐，电子科大核心专业方向热度持续偏高；本省2026年普通高考总人数约23.8万人，较2025年理科5.25万人大幅增长（按比例估算2026理科约16.3万人），竞争显著加剧；电子科技大学位于四川成都，属西南地区，对新疆考生有一定地域吸引力；该校在新疆招生占比极小（约0.2%-0.3%），属跨省招 生，本地生源偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次高位稳定、2026年招生计划持平、本省考生规模大幅增加（竞争加剧）、声誉偏负面等因素，在2025年基准747名基 础上预计竞争略有加剧；预测最低位次约762名，区间648-876名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、网络空间安全、数据科学与大数据技术、人工智能）
- 工科试验班（电子工程类）（电子科学与技术、电磁场与无线技术）
- 电子信息类（信息与通信）（通信工程、电子信息工程、网络工程、物联网工程、信息对抗技术）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（光电集成与光网络）（光电信息科学与工程、信息工程）
- 工科试验班（机器人、电气信息、智能制造）（机器人工程、电气工程及其自动化、机械设计制造及其自动化等）
- 电子信息类（智能仪器、智能控制）（自动化、测控技术与仪器）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 电子信息类（电子信息与地球科学复合培养）（遥感科学与技术、地球信息科学与技术）
- 工科试验班（新材料、新能源与电子化学）（材料科学与工程、新能源材料与器件、应用化学）
- 生物医学工程类（医工交叉、信息生物与基因工程）（生物医学工程、生物技术）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间648-876名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档王牌专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（648名以内）可重点冲刺计算机类、电子工程类等A+学 科专业；位次接近区间上限（876名附近）建议以二档专业为主，确保录取。电子科大以电子信息类为核心优势，相关专业就业前景良好，报考热度持续偏高。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 739, in 2024 approximately 782, and in 2025 approximately 747. Over the past three years, rankings have fluctuated narrowly between 739 and 782. In 2025, the ranking rebounded compared to 2024 (ranking number decreased), showing a high-level stable trend overall, with a baseline of approximately 747 in 2025. The provincial science enrollment plan was 39 in 2023, 39 in 2024, and 36 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 36, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction, thus no direct impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university; ranked 33rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with a stable ranking between 28 and 33 in recent years, belonging to the top-tier science and engineering institutions in China. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving criticism over the handling of student hardship identification incidents and a suspension incident due to an associate professor's ethical misconduct. Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall ranking 33rd), with moderate to high short video exposure. In 2022, there was an abnormal attention signal for the admission cutoff line (low attention), with overall popularity stable. Information and Communication Engineering (A+), Electronic Science and Technology (A+), Computer Science and Technology (A), with a total of 6 A- or above disciplines. The university's strength in electronic information fields is top in the country, strongly attracting applicants to related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication majors were highly recommended in 2024, Computer majors recommended, and the core major directions of UESTC continue to have high popularity. The total number of general college entrance examination takers in the province in 2026 is approximately 238,000, a significant increase from the 52,500 science takers in 2025 (estimated science takers in 2026 about 163,000), leading to intensified competition. UESTC is located in Chengdu, Sichuan, in the southwestern region, which has some regional appeal to Xinjiang examinees. The university's enrollment proportion in Xinjiang is very small (about 0.2%-0.3%), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with limited influence from local student preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as high-level stability of historical rankings, unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, significant increase in the number of provincial examinees (intensified competition), and somewhat negative reputation, competition is expected to slightly intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 747. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 762, with a range of 648-876.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Computer Category (Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Data Science and Big Data Technology, Artificial Intelligence)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Engineering) (Electronic Science and Technology, Electromagnetic Field and Wireless Technology)
- Electronic Information Category (Information and Communication) (Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Network Engineering, Internet of Things Engineering, Information Countermeasure Technology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electronic Information Category (Optoelectronic Integration and Optical Networks) (Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Information Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Robotics, Electrical Information, Intelligent Manufacturing) (Robotics Engineering, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, etc.)
- Electronic Information Category (Intelligent Instruments, Intelligent Control) (Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Electronic Information Category (Electronic Information and Earth Science Composite Training) (Remote Sensing Science and Technology, Earth Information Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (New Materials, New Energy and Electronic Chemistry) (Materials Science and Engineering, New Energy Materials and Devices, Applied Chemistry)
- Biomedical Engineering Category (Medical-Engineering Intersection, Information Biology and Genetic Engineering) (Biomedical Engineering, Biotechnology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With rankings within the predicted range of 648-876, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, sprint for Tier 1 flagship majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 648), focus on sprinting for A+ discipline majors such as Computer Category and Electronic Engineering. If the ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 876), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 2 majors to ensure admission. UESTC's core advantage lies in electronic information majors, with good employment prospects for related majors, and the application popularity remains high.
